ksa_text: Skill in implementing AI system transparency and explainability mechanisms, including model interpretability techniques, output explanation methods, and confidence communication appropriate to different user contexts and regulatory requirements.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-019 (AI & ML/Skill) excluded: out_of_scope: 0 core signals, 2 OOS signals, composite 0.443. Highest framework: NIST AI RMF at 0.443.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope scope, AI & ML, composite 0.443. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge exclusion of AI & ML (composite 0.443)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI & ML at ~95% market presence. LLM development, evaluation, and deployment primary AI Agent Dev competency. Exclusion consistent with role scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent. Final decision: exclude.
